claim_boundary: Git publication scope only; no sequence QC, structure, docking, binding, affinity, competition, blocking, or biological result is changed.
reason: The frozen local structure manifest contains full VHH sequences for all 720 candidates. It is necessary for local/remote reproducibility but is not necessary in the lightweight Git mirror.
supersedes_readme_suggestion: The README allowlist suggestion for node1_evidence/inputs/support_v4a720_structure_manifest.tsv is withdrawn. The original README bytes and startup SHA256SUMS are preserved.
